sections.paragraph:
παραιτέομαι [παρά, αἰτέω] the sense of this verb varies with the force of the prep. as determined by context

—1. w. παρά in a positive sense of expectation of favor from the side of someone ask (for) Mk 15:6; Hb 12:19.

—2. w. παρά in the sense of ‘contrary’ and therefore conveying a neg. sense of disinterest in someth.

—a. excuse Lk 14:18f.

—b. avoid Ac 25:11.

—c. refuse Hb 12: 25; reject 1 Ti 4:7; 2 Ti 2:23; Tit 3:10.

—d. exclude from a list of dependents 1 Ti 5:11.
